name: bun-expert
description: Comprehensive Bun runtime expertise covering all major features. Use when working with Bun projects, migrating from Node.js, or leveraging Bun-specific APIs. Activates for: Bun.serve, Bun.file, bun:test, bun:sqlite, bun install, bun build, bunfig.toml, TypeScript in Bun, package manager operations, bundler configuration, and Node.js compatibility questions.
